title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
friendlyTitle: Oh My OpenAgent helps power users run coding agents
summary: Oh My OpenAgent is a TypeScript coding-agent harness for complex codebases, with editions for OpenCode and Codex and a broader refactor toward multi-harness agent workflows.
friendlySummary: This project adds workflows, hooks, and tools around coding agents like OpenCode and Codex.
whyItMatters: Developers experimenting with coding-agent orchestration can study its hooks, skills, MCP integrations, and Codex/OpenCode adapters. It is a useful signal of where power-user agent workflows are heading.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help developers test more advanced ways of using AI agents on large codebases.
